name_en: M62294 Black Flower. This wallet belongs to the Damier Graphite canvas series. It is stylish and understated, easy to store banknotes, credit cards, and receipts, lightweight and durable, and can be easily put into a jacket or trouser pocket. Dimensions: 12/9cm
